description: Resource type definition for AWS::SageMaker::Context. A context is a lineage tracking entity that represents a logical grouping of other tracking or experiment entities.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the context.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the context.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z\-]*:sagemaker:[a-z0-9\-]*:[0-9]{12}:context/  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ContextName.description: The name of the context. Must be unique to your account in an AWS Region.
ContextName.markdownDescription:
The name of the context. Must be unique to your account in an AWS Region.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 120  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9]([-_]*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,119}$  
Update requires: Replacement

The context type.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: Replacement

Required: No

Maximum Length: 3072
